stories.headline: Pakistan PM, army chief wrap up key trips in push for more US-Iran talks
stories.description: Asim Munir leaves Tehran while PM Shehbaz Sharif heads home from Turkiye with hopes of another round of US-Iran talks.

stories.headline: Pope Leo heads to Angola in landmark Africa visit amid Trump clash
stories.description: Leo is the third pontiff to visit the fossil fuel-rich country after John Paul II in 1992 and Benedict XVI in 2009.

stories.headline: Senior official ousted over Peter Mandelson security row to face MPs
stories.description: Former Former Office chief Sir Olly Robbins is expected to be grilled by the Foreign Affairs Committee on Tuesday.

stories.headline: Iran war: What is happening on day 50 of the US-Iran conflict?
stories.description: Iran reopens the Strait of Hormuz with conditions and threatens closure if the US blockade of Iranian ports continues.

stories.headline: Orbán's era was over in a flash and Hungary's next PM is a man in a hurry
stories.description: Magyar's Tisza party prepares for power after a landslide victory.
